category.scope_note: Wireless and IoT radio devices including Wi-Fi, Bluetooth, and cellular-enabled products exported from China to Turkmenistan, covering MINCOM type approval and Turkmenstandart conformity requirements. Turkmenistan is NOT an EAEU member; EAC marking is not applicable.

title.en: China-to-Turkmenistan Wireless / IoT Device Compliance Gap Matrix (MINCOM)
title.zh: 中国无线/物联网设备进入土库曼斯坦：MINCOM合规差距矩阵
title.zht: 中國無線/物聯網裝置進入土庫曼：MINCOM合規差距矩陣

description.en: Public-interest, source-linked comparison of common China wireless and IoT device documentation against Turkmenistan requirements under MINCOM (Ministry of Communications — Aragatnaşyk ministrliginiň) and Türkmenstandart (State Standard of Turkmenistan). Covers MINCOM radio type approval and frequency permits, Türkmenstandart Certificate of Conformity based on GOST-TM standards, electrical safety for the 220 V/50 Hz Type C/F grid, local Turkmen importer and state import permission requirements, and cybersecurity obligations under Turkmenistan's 2014 Cybercrime Law. Turkmenistan is not a member of the EAEU; EAC marking does not apply and separate Turkmen conformity is required.
description.zh: 公益性、带来源链接的中国无线及物联网设备文件与土库曼斯坦MINCOM（通信部——Aragatnaşyk ministrliginiň）及土库曼标准委员会（Türkmenstandart）要求的差距对照，涵盖MINCOM无线电型号核准与频率许可、基于GOST-TM标准的Türkmenstandart合格证书、220V/50Hz C/F型插座电气安全、当地土库曼进口商及国家进口许可要求，以及土库曼斯坦2014年网络犯罪法下的网络安全义务。土库曼斯坦不是欧亚经济联盟成员，EAC标志不适用，须单独满足土库曼合规要求。
description.zht: 公益性、附來源連結的中國無線及物聯網裝置文件與土庫曼MINCOM（通信部——Aragatnaşyk ministrliginiň）及土庫曼標準委員會（Türkmenstandart）要求的差距對照，涵蓋MINCOM無線電型號核准與頻率許可、基於GOST-TM標準的Türkmenstandart合格證書、220V/50Hz C/F型插座電氣安全、當地土庫曼進口商及國家進口許可要求，以及土庫曼2014年網路犯罪法下的網路安全義務。土庫曼不是歐亞經濟聯盟成員，EAC標誌不適用，須單獨滿足土庫曼合規要求。

disclaimer.en: This page is an informational comparison aid, not a certification decision, legal opinion, customs determination, or market-access approval. Turkmenistan's regulatory framework for wireless devices is subject to change, and enforcement practices in this state-controlled market may differ significantly from published rules. Exporters, importers, and distributors should verify current requirements with qualified regulatory professionals and the relevant authorities (MINCOM, Türkmenstandart) before shipment. State procurement channels and government-to-government arrangements may impose additional or different requirements.
disclaimer.zh: 本页仅为信息性对照工具，不构成认证结论、法律意见、海关裁定或市场准入批准。土库曼斯坦无线设备监管框架可能有所变化，该国家管控市场的实际执法可能与已发布规定存在重大差异。出口商、进口商和经销商在出货前，应与合格监管专业人士及相关主管机构（MINCOM、Türkmenstandart）核验现行要求。国家采购渠道及政府间安排可能附加不同要求。
disclaimer.zht: 本頁僅為資訊性對照工具，不構成認證結論、法律意見、海關裁定或市場准入批准。土庫曼無線設備監管框架可能有所變化，該國家管控市場的實際執法可能與已發布規定存在重大差異。出口商、進口商和經銷商在出貨前，應與合格監管專業人士及相關主管機構（MINCOM、Türkmenstandart）核驗現行要求。國家採購渠道及政府間安排可能附加不同要求。

answer_first.en: Wireless devices entering Turkmenistan require MINCOM (Ministry of Communications) type approval and frequency permit for all radio and telecom terminal equipment, plus a Türkmenstandart Certificate of Conformity based on GOST-TM standards. Turkmenistan is NOT a member of the EAEU; EAC marking does not apply and separate Turkmen conformity is mandatory. Electrical safety testing is required for the 220 V/50 Hz Type C/F grid. An authorised Turkmen importer entity is required; state import permission may additionally be required for larger shipments. Wi-Fi 5 GHz use requires a separate MINCOM frequency permit. Chinese CCC, SRRC, and CE marks are not recognised and do not substitute for Turkmen approvals. The market is heavily state-controlled (Turkmentelekom infrastructure monopoly) and significant Chinese infrastructure presence means government procurement channels are common.
answer_first.zh: 进入土库曼斯坦的无线设备须取得MINCOM（通信部）对所有无线电及电信终端设备的型号核准与频率许可，以及基于GOST-TM标准的Türkmenstandart合格证书。土库曼斯坦不是欧亚经济联盟成员，EAC标志不适用，须强制满足单独的土库曼合规要求。须针对220V/50Hz C/F型插座电网进行电气安全测试。须有授权的土库曼进口商实体；大批量货物可能还须额外取得国家进口许可。Wi-Fi 5GHz使用须单独申请MINCOM频率许可。中国CCC、SRRC及CE标志不被承认，不可替代土库曼核准。该市场受国家高度管控（土库曼电信基础设施垄断），中国基础设施的大量存在使政府采购渠道较为普遍。
answer_first.zht: 進入土庫曼的無線設備須取得MINCOM（通信部）對所有無線電及電信終端設備的型號核准與頻率許可，以及基於GOST-TM標準的Türkmenstandart合格證書。土庫曼不是歐亞經濟聯盟成員，EAC標誌不適用，須強制滿足單獨的土庫曼合規要求。須針對220V/50Hz C/F型插座電網進行電氣安全測試。須有授權的土庫曼進口商實體；大批量貨物可能還須額外取得國家進口許可。Wi-Fi 5GHz使用須單獨申請MINCOM頻率許可。中國CCC、SRRC及CE標誌不被承認，不可替代土庫曼核准。該市場受國家高度管控（土庫曼電信基礎設施壟斷），中國基礎設施的大量存在使政府採購渠道較為普遍。

editorial_controls.change_policy: Rows must include publisher, official URL, access date, and verification flag before human_reviewed can be set to true.
